title: Cycle Tracker
summary: A full-stack Java application with a Spring Boot REST API and JavaFX client for tracking menstrual cycles and medication schedules, created using an agent-assisted development workflow (Codex).

title: Shared Calendar App
summary: A React shared calendar app for managing day-based events with a monthly view, simulated multiple users, andlocalStorage persistence.

title: Password Manager
summary: A secure Python CLI app for generating and managing encrypted passwords.
